title: The Automation Unemployment Debate
description: A flowchart illustrating the opposing arguments on whether AI and robots will lead to widespread unemployment.
relationships: Technological Advancement leads to Job Displacement AND Job Creation
Job Displacement and Job Creation lead to Economic Restructuring
Economic Restructuring's outcome is determined by Societal Response
An inadequate Societal Response leads to Widespread Unemployment (Outcome A)
A proactive Societal Response focused on reskilling leads to Full Employment (Outcome B)
A balanced Societal Response managing the transition leads to Job Transformation (Outcome C)
